title: Rulemaking
doc_html:
§1168.6. Rulemaking

            The board shall promulgate all such rules in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act as are necessary to implement the provisions of this Subpart.

            Acts 2019, No. 207, §1.
doc_text:
§1168.6.  Rulemaking
The board shall promulgate all such rules in accordance with the Administrative
Procedure Act as are necessary to implement the provisions of this Subpart.
Acts 2019, No. 207, §1.
